posts.content: 我生于沛国谯县。少年时机警任侠，放荡不羁，但我从不掩饰：我要读书，更要读懂人心与时势。
posts.translation: I was born in Qiao, Pei—sharp, unruly, fond of swagger—but I never hid that I meant to read books and read men and seasons.

posts.content: 官渡之后，我一步步吞并河北。挟天子以令我固然背负骂名，却也使我号令名正言顺。
posts.translation: After Guandu I swallowed the north piece by piece. Holding the emperor earned me blame—and the power to command in the ruler's name.

posts.content: 我进位魏王：立法抑豪强，倡唯才是举。我不问出身，只问能不能替我平定天下。
posts.translation: I rose as King of Wei—law to curb great houses, promotion by merit alone. I asked only whether you could help me settle the realm.

posts.content: 我在洛阳咽下最后一口气。后人叫我奸雄也罢——我的功业与诗文，我自己交代在这乱世里了。
posts.translation: I drew my last breath in Luoyang. Call me villain if you like—I settled my accounts with this age in deeds and verse.
